risks.title: 生活光影默认私密
risks.rule: memory/photo content defaults to private unless manually illuminated

risks.title: AI 草案不得自动公开
risks.rule: ai-draft content requires manual approval before public index

risks.title: sealed 内容不得进入 public manifest
公开技术节点需去除敏感环境信息
risks.rule: technical public nodes require secret and environment scan

risks.title: 半公开节点只允许摘要级展示
risks.rule: semi-public content can appear as summary-only projection
